Slice 1 of v1, vertical 1: titania-core primitives + deep tests.

DELIVERED:
- crates/titania-core with 4 domain primitives + 1 errors module:
  - Digest: 64-char lowercase hex blake3 hash, validates non-hex chars + length
  - RuleId: uppercase-ASCII + underscore-validated rule identifier
  - WorkspacePath: relative POSIX path with no-backslash, no-dotdot, no-leading-slash, NFC-normalized
  - TextRange: half-open byte range with end>=start
- Typed errors via thiserror (DigestError, RuleIdError, WorkspacePathError, TextRangeError, CoreError aggregator)
- Smart constructors returning Result; once constructed, invariants type-enforced
- Workspace Cargo.toml with Holzmann lints forbid/deny (forbid(unsafe_code), -D clippy::unwrap_used/expect_used/panic)
- rustfmt.toml + clippy.toml for house style

TESTS (81 passed across 6 suites, 0 failed):
- crates/titania-core/tests/unit_tests.rs (~60 unit tests): exact boundary, lower/upper hex at every position, control bytes 0x01..0x20, dotdot variants, NFC normalization, serde round-trip, etc.
- crates/titania-core/tests/properties.rs (proptest): digest_determinism, digest_injective_sampled, digest_charset+length, rule_id_round_trip+normalization, workspace_path_*_reject invariants, text_range_width_overflow-safety, JSON round-trip across primitives
- crates/titania-core/tests/json_roundtrip.rs (serde): structured-shape validation + rejection of hostiles per primitive
- crates/titania-core/tests/bdd.rs: 4 Given/When/Then scenarios exercising the public API end-to-end

MOON SCAFFOLD:
- .moon/workspace.yml: single-project workspace rooted at '.'
- .moon/project.yml: type=library, language=rust
- .moon/toolchains.yml: rust stable, syncToolchainConfig
- .moon/tasks/all.yml: 12 tasks wired (fmt, lint-src, clippy-all, check, test, build, audit, deny, geiger, quick, pre-push, ci)
- rust-toolchain.toml: pinned by Moon

HOLZMANN GATE (verified):
- cargo fmt --check: clean
- cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings -D clippy::unwrap_used -D clippy::expect_used -D clippy::panic: clean
- cargo test --workspace: 81 passed
- cargo build --workspace --release: 9 crates compiled
- cargo geiger -p titania-core --all-features: 0 first-party unsafe (transitive deps have warnings)
- rg for production assert!/unreachable!: 0 matches in src/

MOON-DRIVEN GATE (verified):
- moon :fmt / :lint-src / :clippy-all / :check / :test / :quick / :pre-push: all pass

PROOF OBLIGATIONS (deferred to follow-up beads per go-skill pipeline):
- Verus + Flux + Kani + fuzz harnesses for the 4 primitives are scoped in the epic (tn-b2w) description; this vertical lands the executable code with deep tests, not the formal proof.
